mapper.update: UPDATE main_task SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO administrator (requirementID, mainTaskID, requirementName, requirementDetail, createTime, tag, otherInfo) VALUES (#{requirementID}, #{mainTaskID}, #{requirementName}, #{requirementDetail}, #{creatTime}, #{tag}, #{otherInfo})
mapper.update: UPDATE requirement_form SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
